title: sabdariffa digitata
intro: Sabdariffa digitata, also known as the roselle or hibiscus sabdariffa, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the mallow family, native to the Old World tropics. The medicinal properties of sabdariffa digitata lie in its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and ability to lower blood pressure. The health benefits of consuming sabdariffa digitata include reducing cholesterol levels, aiding in weight loss, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of sabdariffa digitata include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be made by drying the plant's flowers and calyces, and then infusing them in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
